title: Search any brand's political donations before you buy
desc: Search 7,000+ companies' political donations before you buy. Stop accidentally funding the people deporting your neighbors.

title: Get the browser extension that flags MAGA-aligned brands
desc: Browser extension auto-flags MAGA-aligned brands as you shop. Make every checkout a small political choice.

title: Use the Trump-tied retailers boycott list
desc: Spreadsheet of every retailer carrying Trump-family products. Pull up before you shop — names update weekly.

title: Join coordinated 24-hour economic blackouts
desc: Coordinated 24-hour buy-nothing blackouts that hit corporate dailies. Sign up for the next date.

title: Sign the Tesla Takedown commitment
desc: Sell Tesla stock, dump the lease, and join Saturday dealership protests. Hits Musk where it actually hurts.

title: Join the Latino-led economic blackout
desc: Latino-led campaign to freeze spending in protest of mass-deportation policies. Sign up for the calendar.

title: Switch your spending to a Black-women-owned biz
desc: Directory of Black-women-owned businesses to swap your usual orders into. Buy here instead of Amazon.

title: Buy from a Native-owned business instead
desc: Native-owned business directory + marketplace. Trump's land-grab and pipeline pushes hit these communities first.

title: RSVP to the next Saturday Tesla Takedown
desc: Live map of Tesla dealership protests near you. Saturday actions only — no commitment required.

title: Subscribe to Free DC mobilization alerts
desc: DC-area mobilization alerts for protests, court days, and federal-building actions. Subscribe and show up.

title: Become a Veterans for Peace member
desc: Vets in service insignia deter cops and counter-protesters at rallies. Be the visible spine of your local march.

title: Join About Face: Veterans Against the War
desc: Post-9/11 vets organizing direct action against US wars. More aggressive than VFP — for vets ready to risk arrest.

title: Find an ADAPT chapter (disability direct action)
desc: Disability-led direct action — sit-ins, building takeovers, hill visits. Find or start a chapter; remote roles available.

title: Find a Drag Story Hour to attend / livestream
desc: Show up to a Drag Story Hour to protect performers from Proud Boys harassment. Adults present = events go forward.

title: Sign up for Refuse Fascism action alerts
desc: Anti-fascist protest network with simple action alerts. Stand against Trump's authoritarian playbook publicly.

title: Sign up with Code Pink
desc: Code Pink runs the disruptive bird-dog actions you see in Senate hearings. Get alerts for the next DC pop-up.

title: Volunteer as a Practical Support driver (repro)
desc: Drive abortion-seekers to/from clinics and overnight stays. Trump's national-ban push makes practical support life-saving.

title: Sponsor + drive for refugees via Welcome.US
desc: Drive refugees to appointments, IKEA runs, school. Trump cut admissions but families already here need community.

title: Submit a tip (anonymous SecureDrop)
desc: Submit a tip via SecureDrop. ProPublica turns insider docs into pressure that has fired federal officials.

title: Submit a tip on criminal-justice / detention
desc: Tip line for prison conditions, ICE detention abuses, and prosecutor misconduct. Their reporting changes laws.

title: Submit a leak to The Intercept
desc: Submit national-security leaks via SecureDrop. Intercept broke Snowden — they protect sources better than most.

title: Tell them about an ICE raid (NYC)
desc: NYC tip line for ICE raids and immigration enforcement. Real-time alerts go to neighborhood networks.

title: Pitch a Black-community story
desc: Pitch a Black-community story to a Black-led investigative newsroom. Coverage that mainstream outlets miss.

title: Pitch a gender + politics story
desc: Pitch a story on abortion access, trans healthcare bans, or gender + politics. They cover what AP won't.

title: Pitch on local DA / sheriff / election admin
desc: Pitch on your local DA, sheriff, or election admin. MAGA's takeover happens at county level — Bolts covers it nationally.

title: Send an investigative idea
desc: Pitch an investigative idea; they fund the reporter to chase it. Best route for a freelancer with a real lead.

title: Pitch a war / civil-liberties story
desc: Pitch ex-Intercept reporters on US wars and civil liberties. Fewer institutional constraints, more aggressive coverage.

title: Pitch a labor story (video)
desc: Pitch a labor story for video — strikes, union drives, wage theft. Their content goes viral on TikTok and IG.

title: Send a dark-money tip
desc: Tip Sirota's team on dark money or corporate corruption. They've forced multiple federal investigations.

title: Submit a campaign-finance tip
desc: Tip on a campaign-finance violation or shadow donor. Sludge specializes in unmasking who's actually paying for what.

title: Report a press-freedom violation
desc: Report any arrest, equipment seizure, or assault on a journalist. Trump-era press attacks need a public record.

title: Find your nearest chapter + meeting time
desc: Find your nearest DSA chapter and meeting time. Local chapters run mutual aid, tenant work, and electoral campaigns.

title: Apply to a virtual intro call
desc: White-led solidarity for Black, brown, and Indigenous-led campaigns. Apply for the virtual intro to start showing up.

title: Sign up for a hub welcome call
desc: Youth-led climate org with remote-friendly local hubs. Sign up for a welcome call to find your role this season.

title: RSVP for next event (local + virtual)
desc: RSVP to the next local + virtual event. WFP runs electoral campaigns and issue ballot fights state by state.

title: Join virtual monthly mass assembly
desc: Rev. Barber's monthly mass assembly fuses faith and policy. Join virtually to plug into Poor People's organizing nationally.

title: Find your local circle
desc: Latinx-led organizing focused on immigration defense and abolition. Find your local circle.

title: Find a local team
desc: Mom-led climate org with neighborhood teams. Find a local team — work fits around school pickups and naptime.

title: Find a local group
desc: Progressive Jewish organizing against Christian nationalism and authoritarianism. Find a local group.

title: Join a federal-worker organizing call
desc: Federal-worker organizing call. Trump's purges and RIFs are coordinated — cross-agency response has to be too.

title: Migrate your X follows to Bluesky
desc: Free extension finds your X follows on Bluesky in one click. Bring your network when you ditch Musk's platform.

title: Make a Bluesky account
desc: Make a Bluesky account. No algorithm tilt, no Musk, no Meta — where activist Twitter rebuilt itself.

title: Make a Mastodon account on a movement-aligned server
desc: Mastodon account on an anti-fascist server. Federated, no corporate owner, harder to deplatform leftists.

title: Save a threatened page now
desc: One-click archive of any URL — .gov pages, news, evidence. Scrub-proof your sources before they vanish.

title: Make a Pixelfed account (federated Insta)
desc: Federated photo-sharing, no algorithm. Activist-friendly Insta alternative with no Meta tracking or shadowban.

title: Embroider + ship a Trump quote to the archive
desc: Embroider a Trump quote and ship it to the archive. Group exhibitions, gallery shows, permanent record.

title: Knit a Welcome Blanket for a new immigrant
desc: Knit a 40\" blanket with a welcome note. Each is hand-delivered to a newly-arrived immigrant family.

title: Knit a Pussyhat from updated patterns
desc: Knit a Pussyhat from updated patterns or mail one in for the next march. Visible cohort = visible resistance.

title: Sign up for the postcard drop
desc: Hand-illustrate postcards to swing-district voters. Personal mail still cuts through algorithm-poisoned discourse.

title: Mail a handmade card to a detained migrant
desc: Mail handmade cards to a specific person in ICE detention. Mail breaks isolation; signals 'someone's watching'.

title: Sign petitions to overturn Citizens United
desc: Sign petitions for the constitutional amendment overturning Citizens United. Long fight; needs persistent pressure.

title: Sign current petitions
desc: Sign petitions on corporate accountability and judicial reform. Their pressure has produced FTC and SEC actions.

title: Demand fair maps — end partisan gerrymandering
desc: Sign for independent redistricting. Gerrymandered maps let MAGA hold state legislatures with 30% of voters.

title: Sign court-reform petitions
desc: Sign court-reform petitions. Demand Justice drove the SCOTUS-expansion conversation — momentum keeps it alive.

title: Sign media-reform petitions
desc: Sign petitions on platform disinfo, net neutrality, and FCC oversight. Trump's FCC is gutting consumer protections.

title: Sign civil-rights petitions
desc: Sign petitions on ICE detention and warrantless surveillance. CCR wins these in court — your name builds standing.

title: Sign Black-led racial-justice petitions
desc: Sign Black-led racial-justice petitions — police accountability, voting rights, corporate equity. CoC moves money.

title: Sign civil-liberties petitions
desc: Sign civil-liberties petitions on surveillance, big-tech, and antitrust. Their email pressure flips swing senators.

title: Sign AAPI petitions
desc: Sign AAPI campaigns on hate-crime response, immigration, and voting access. Trump's anti-Asian rhetoric needs counter-pressure.

title: Sign Christian-rooted petitions vs. Christian nationalism
desc: Sign Christian petitions against Christian nationalism. The right's loudest base needs visible religious dissent — that's you.

title: Sign anti-militarism petitions
desc: Sign anti-war petitions targeting the Pentagon budget and weapons sales. Restrain Trump's foreign-policy improv.

title: Sign petitions to close ICE facilities
desc: Sign petitions targeting specific ICE detention facilities for closure. Local fights, federal pressure.

title: Sign the open letter against book bans
desc: Sign the open letter against book bans. Names from authors, librarians, and readers create local-news pressure.

title: Sign Avaaz US-targeted petitions
desc: Sign Avaaz US-targeted petitions. High signature volume amplifies pressure on Congress and corporations.

authorName: People For (formerly People For the American Way)
title: Sign the petition to protect voting rights in the Senate
desc: Tell your senators to defend voting rights against the assault on free and fair elections. People For's open call to action.

title: Sign children's-rights petitions
desc: Sign petitions on child healthcare, gun violence, and poverty programs. Trump's budget cuts hit kids first.

title: Become a SURJ member
desc: Become a SURJ member to organize white people for racial justice. Apply for the virtual intro call.

title: Become a DSA member
desc: DSA chapters run mutual aid, electoral, and tenant work in nearly every metro. Joining locally finds the doers near you.

title: Join Sunrise Movement
desc: Climate-led, youth-driven org. Join Sunrise to organize for the Green New Deal and climate accountability.

title: Join Mijente
desc: Latinx organizing for immigration defense and abolition. Local circles plug you in to immediate work.

desc: Largest immigrant-youth-led network in the country. Plug into ICE response, deportation defense, and policy work.

title: Join Bend the Arc
desc: Jewish anti-authoritarian organizing. Join to find Jewish-led action against Christian nationalism near you.

title: Join Jewish Voice for Peace
desc: Jewish-led anti-occupation and civil-liberties organizing. Local chapters in 70+ cities.

title: Join T'ruah (rabbinic human rights)
desc: Rabbinic human rights org. Rabbis + cantors lead immigration defense, anti-Christian-nationalism, and dignity work.

title: Subscribe to FCNL action alerts (Quaker)
desc: Quaker action alerts for constituent calls and emails. Pacifist-rooted, focused on Pentagon budget and immigration.

title: Join Pax Christi USA (Catholic peace)
desc: Catholic peace + justice movement. Join for nonviolence training and faith-rooted resistance to militarism.

title: Take a NETWORK action (Catholic social justice)
desc: Catholic social-justice lobby. Take action on healthcare, immigration, and the federal budget — nuns lead this.

title: Take a Sikh Coalition action
desc: Sikh civil-rights advocacy. Take action on hate-crime response, religious-discrimination, and racial profiling.

title: Volunteer with Mothers Out Front
desc: Volunteer with Mothers Out Front. Mom-led climate org with flexible roles around school and family schedules.

title: Take an ADAPT action (disability rights)
desc: Take an ADAPT action — disability-led direct action against Medicaid cuts and institutionalization.

title: Take a Black Voters Matter action
desc: Take a Black Voters Matter action. Voter-protection fights happen at county and state level — they target there.

title: Take a Mi Familia Vota action
desc: Take a Mi Familia Vota action. Latino civic engagement — voter registration and protection in swing states.

title: Take a Climate Justice Alliance action
desc: Take a Climate Justice Alliance action. Frontline community-led climate fights — pipelines, refineries, evictions.

title: Sponsor a refugee household
desc: Sponsor a refugee household through a verified federal pathway. Remote prep work counts.

title: Make your city 'welcoming' for immigrants
desc: Push your city to certify as a 'welcoming city' for immigrants. Public commitment makes ICE cooperation costly.

title: Pressure your mayor on sanctuary policy
desc: Pressure your mayor to join the immigrant-friendly cities coalition. Mayoral commitments slow ICE locally.

title: Volunteer to furnish + resettle refugee homes
desc: Furnish + resettle refugee homes — physical setup or remote logistics. Trump's cuts mean more families with less support.

title: Get an organizer for your workplace
desc: Free organizer helps you unionize your workplace, confidentially. Trump's NLRB is gutted — build power directly.

title: Join the federal-worker network
desc: Join the federal-worker network. Trump's RIFs and Schedule F purges need cross-agency mutual aid + organizing.

title: Subscribe to independent labor media
desc: Subscribe to indie labor media + training calendar. Best source for what's happening in shops outside the big unions.

title: Start a workplace petition
desc: Host a workplace petition — raises, anti-ICE-cooperation pledges. Public petitions force the boss to acknowledge.

title: Take a UE solidarity action
desc: Solidarity action with UE — independent rank-and-file union. Often the most aggressive on contract fights.

title: Apply for IWW membership

desc: Sign on to NDWA campaigns. Domestic workers (housekeepers, nannies, caregivers) organizing for federal protections.

desc: Send solidarity to Starbucks workers fighting union-busting. Their store-by-store wins set the precedent for service work.

title: Take an Amazon Labor Union action
desc: Take an Amazon Labor Union action. The hardest org fight in the country — solidarity dollars and petitions matter.

title: Use the free legal hotline (workplace family rights)
desc: Free legal hotline for workplace family + caregiving rights. Use if you're being denied FMLA, pumping breaks, or accommodations.

desc: Successor to Fight for $15. Sign on to a sectoral campaign for living wages and a real union, not just minimums.

title: Sign the moral covenant

title: Subscribe to action alerts
desc: Subscribe to Sojourners' Christian-justice action alerts. Progressive Christian voice in DC policy fights.

title: Subscribe to actions
desc: Subscribe to Faithful America's Christian-rooted campaigns against Christian nationalism. Visible religious dissent.

title: Sign on to a Faith in Public Life advocacy action
desc: Sign on to multi-faith advocacy actions. Coalition lobbying that fuses Christian, Jewish, Muslim, and Hindu progressives.

title: Take a rabbinic action
desc: Take a rabbinic action. Rabbis and cantors organize on immigration, occupation, and Christian nationalism.

title: Sign on to a Pax Christi USA peace action
desc: Sign Pax Christi USA peace actions. Catholic-rooted resistance to militarism and the Pentagon budget.

title: Subscribe to Quaker action alerts
desc: Subscribe to Quaker constituent-action emails. Pacifist-rooted, focused on Pentagon and immigration policy.

desc: Sign on to faith-leader campaigns. Auburn trains multi-faith clergy in social justice and movement leadership.

desc: Sign Sikh Coalition civil-rights actions. Hate-crime response, religious-discrimination, and racial-profiling work.

desc: Sign up as a volunteer attorney. Match takes 20 minutes; cases include immigrants, election workers, federal whistleblowers.

desc: Hours go to immigrants and federal workers fighting Trump-era retaliation. Lawyers especially — 20-min match.

desc: Find pro bono cases. Volunteer-attorney matching for civil-legal cases — most need procedural help, not litigation.

desc: Volunteer your tech skills. Local brigades build tools for governments and nonprofits — replace shitty .gov UX.

desc: Sign up as a tech volunteer. Project matching for devs, designers, and PMs supporting democracy-org tooling.

title: Volunteer your professional skills
desc: Volunteer your professional skills (design, marketing, ops, finance) to nonprofits. 1–10 hour bites; remote-friendly.

title: Volunteer as a translator
desc: Volunteer as a translator for asylum cases. Crisis-language work — hours can save someone from deportation.

desc: Volunteer as a linguist for crisis-response work. Less-resourced languages especially needed for refugee work.

title: Sign on to a Doctors for America healthcare campaign
desc: Sign on to Doctors for America campaigns. Medical voices that move members of Congress on Medicaid + ACA.

desc: Train as an asylum-evaluation clinician. Forensic medical exams for asylum cases — without one, deportation odds spike.

title: Sign up to run for office (STEM)
desc: Sign up to run for office (STEM). Trump's anti-science agenda needs scientists in office — they'll train you.

title: Volunteer with Authors Against Book Bans
desc: Volunteer with Authors Against Book Bans. Authors, librarians, readers showing up at school-board meetings.

desc: Archivists organizing to preserve federal records as Trump scrubs them. Need archivists, devs, and metadata pros.

desc: Volunteer on detained-immigrant cases. Free training + case match. Pro bono representation triples release odds.

title: Take the anti-coup civil-resistance pledge
desc: Take the anti-coup civil-resistance pledge. Public commitment to nonviolent action if Trump refuses to leave office.

desc: Daily script + your reps' direct lines. Two minutes a weekday is what stopped 2017's ACA repeal — same model works.

desc: Print + carry Know-Your-Rights cards. Pull one out if ICE approaches — works for citizen and non-citizen alike.

desc: Reminders for every contest — primaries, school board, judges. Off-cycle elections are where MAGA quietly stacks boards.

title: Send an SMS that becomes an email/fax to your reps
desc: Text turns into emails or faxes to your reps. Resistbot is the laziest possible way to keep contacting them.

title: Send today's email script
desc: Send today's email script to your reps. 5 Calls' staff write the message; you spend 90 seconds personalizing.

title: Tell Congress: reject mass government surveillance
desc: Email your reps to oppose surveillance expansion. Trump's DHS uses these tools to track immigrants, journalists, and protesters.

desc: Send an anti-militarism email to your reps. Win Without War targets Pentagon budget votes specifically.

desc: Email your school board against book bans. Pre-written templates work — boards capitulate when pressure hits.

desc: Workshops most arrest-action groups send people through. Get de-escalation and jail-support before you need them.

title: Sign up for a training
desc: Direct-action training. Ruckus prepared protesters at Standing Rock and Occupy. Sign up for a workshop.

desc: Apply with your group for movement-strategy training. Best for orgs that need help going from reactive to strategic.

title: Take a course
desc: Take an organizer course. Sliding-scale tuition; classes on de-escalation, racial justice, and base-building.

desc: Learn what to actually do when ICE detains a neighbor or a Nazi accosts someone on transit. Free, 60–90 min.

title: Enroll in anti-coup training
desc: Enroll in anti-coup training. Free workshop calendar — what to do if Trump refuses a peaceful transfer of power.

desc: Storied southern movement school — MLK and Rosa Parks trained here. Apply for residential or virtual programs.

title: Sign up for a curriculum
desc: Sign up for just-transition + ecological-justice curriculum. Climate work that connects to labor and racial justice.

desc: Sign up for an abolitionist reading group. Critical Resistance is OG abolition — Angela Davis co-founded it.

desc: Apply to be a paid poll worker. Local elections are short on workers; you get paid + protect access for hours of your day.

title: Take a Know Your Rights training
desc: Take a Know Your Rights training for ICE encounters. Live calendar; bring your block, household, or workplace.

title: Sign up for kindness-toned voter postcards
desc: Write hand-written postcards to swing-state voters. Personal mail still cuts through algorithm-fried discourse.

desc: Become a pen pal to a detained migrant. Mail breaks isolation in ICE detention; bilingual letters welcome.

desc: Volunteer for LGBTQ youth digital crisis support. 24/7 chat/text/phone — paid training, ongoing support.

desc: Practice rest-as-resistance prompts. Tricia Hersey's free library — burnout is the goal of fascism, sleep counters it.

desc: Find + amplify your local mutual aid network. Map of US-wide groups — money, supplies, people on the ground.

desc: Boost a single Palestinian family's GoFundMe from a vetted queue. Direct, traceable, no big-org skim.

desc: Subscribe + share Capital B coverage. Black-led investigative work that mainstream outlets don't cover.

desc: Subscribe + share Documented. NYC immigration-focused journalism that hits ICE operations in real time.

desc: Submit + share press-freedom incidents. Public record of every press attack — fuels lawsuits and policy fights.

desc: Download free anti-fascist posters. Co-op of printmakers; high-quality designs for protests, walls, and zines.

desc: Embroider a Trump quote and ship to the project archive. Permanent record + group-show exhibitions.

desc: Apply for forum theater + virtual workshops. Boal's method for rehearsing political action — practice the protest.

desc: Use the Yes Men's tactical-prank toolkit. Step-by-step satire playbook — they impersonated execs to expose climate lies.

desc: Refer an artist at risk. Solidarity for persecuted artists — visa, legal, and relocation support during crackdowns.

desc: Find your local mutual aid network. Pick one neighbor to support this week — money, food, rides, anything.

desc: Translate documents for asylum seekers. Hours of your time can prevent a deportation; bilingual = high-value.

desc: Subscribe to Sludge and share their campaign-finance investigations on social. Counter dark-money disinfo with sourced reporting.

desc: Subscribe to Inkstick and share their non-DC foreign policy coverage. Counter the bipartisan war-and-empire consensus.

desc: Sign up for op-ed training. They've placed thousands of underrepresented voices in major papers — works.

desc: Use weekly LTE prompts targeting state-level fights. Coordinated submissions to district papers move ratings.

desc: Use AAUW's two-minute activist tool. LTE templates + submission. Women's-org muscle behind every signature.

desc: Use Inequality.org's LTE templates with verified stats. Drop the chart links and let editors do the rest.

desc: Trans peer crisis line: 877-565-8860. No police dispatch, no involuntary holds. Save the number for your friends.

desc: LGBTQ youth crisis line — 24/7 chat, text, phone. Save it; share it with any kid in your life feeling targeted.

desc: Peer hotline + chat for LGBTQ folks of any age. Calm peer support, not crisis — for the bad-day moments.

desc: Subscribe to Kelly Hayes' podcast. Anti-burnout, abolitionist, movement-stamina lessons — keep going for the long fight.

desc: Find a peer mental-health chapter. Campus + online network — good fit for college students or new grads.

desc: Find a free virtual support group. Family + peer mental-health support; weekly, online, no insurance needed.

desc: Sign up to run for office. Under 40, progressive — they handle the hard parts, you focus on the door knocks.

desc: Apply for free women's candidate training. They've run thousands of women — training is rigorous, free, ongoing.

desc: Free DOJ-accredited rep training. Trump's mass deportation needs more accredited reps — non-lawyers can do this.

desc: Self-paced first-time-protester guide from 50501 — what to wear, what to bring, how to stay safe in a crowd, what to do if police escalate. Read once before you
